CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO WESTFIELD LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-12-2015 AT 5:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-23-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTFIELD, LLC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICROSOFT STORE WAS REPRESENTED BY ROMEO BERANA II--PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT WESTFIELD LLC. WAS REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY ROSSI--ASSISTANT GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT MICROSOFT CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'NEIL, ANYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MICROSOFT CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
